gist.headline: Fresh Ink
gist.blurb: Keeping the front page fresh with the latest buzz from the hive.
gist.summary: Automated update to the README's latest news section to reflect recent project activity.
gist.impact: Ensures visitors to the repository immediately see the most current updates and links.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee pinning a new piece of paper onto a wooden community bulletin board in a garden setting. The board represents the README.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot pinning a new notice onto a wooden community bulletin board in a garden. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic and organized.
